input.command:
cd /tmp
openssl rand -base64 756 > /tmp/mongo-keyfile
# create secrets
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic mongodb-keyfile --from-file=keyfile=/tmp/mongo-keyfile
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic admin-user-password --from-literal=password=admin123password
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic app-user-password --from-literal=password=app123password
echo "---"; kubectl -n mongodb get secret

content.text: Now the Service and StatefulSet manifests:

input.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongodb
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              cp /etc/mongodb-keyfile-src/keyfile /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
              chmod 400 /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
              chown 999:999 /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-src
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb-keyfile-src
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb-keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongodb
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
            - "--replSet"
            - mongodb-replica
            - "--bind_ip_all"
            - "--auth"
            - "--keyFile"
            - /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
          ports:
            - containerPort: 27017
              name: mongodb
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb-keyfile
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - bash
                - -c
                - "mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.adminCommand({ping:1})'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-src
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
            defaultMode: 0400
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 1Gi

kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica

    - name: mongodb
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10
      initContainers:
        - name: copy-keyfile
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - bash
            - -c
            - |
              cp /etc/mongodb-keyfile-src/keyfile /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
              chmod 400 /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
              chown 999:999 /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-src
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb-keyfile-src
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb-keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongodb
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
            - "--replSet"
            - mongodb-replica
            - "--bind_ip_all"
            - "--auth"
            - "--keyFile"
            - /etc/mongodb-keyfile/keyfile
          ports:
            - containerPort: 27017
              name: mongodb
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb-keyfile
          readinessProbe:

              command:
                - bash

                - "mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.adminCommand({ping:1})'"
            initialDelaySeconds: 15

      volumes:

        accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]

input.command:
cd /mydata/karma/runs/long-examples/mongodb-long-all-cases-marathon-a-20260618_080426/stages/stage_01
for i in $(seq 1 40); do
  ready=$(kubectl -n mongodb get statefulset mongodb-replica -o jsonpath='{.status.readyReplicas}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "iter $i readyReplicas=${ready:-0}"
  kubectl -n mongodb get pods -o wide 2>&1 | grep mongodb-replica
  if [ "${ready:-0}" = "3" ]; then echo "ALL READY"; break; fi
  sleep 15
done

content.text: PRIMARY + 2 SECONDARY. Now create the admin user via localhost exception, then the app user:

input.command:
PRIMARY=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'print(db.hello().primary)' 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
echo "Primary: $PRIMARY"
POD=mongodb-replica-0
case "$PRIMARY" in
  mongodb-replica-1*) POD=mongodb-replica-1;;
  mongodb-replica-2*) POD=mongodb-replica-2;;
esac
echo "Primary pod: $POD"
echo "$POD" > /tmp/primary_pod.txt
# create admin user via localhost exception
kubectl -n mongodb exec $POD -- mongosh --quiet admin --eval '
db.createUser({
  user: "admin-user",
  pwd: "admin123password",
  roles: [ { role: "root", db: "admin" } ]
})' 2>&1

POD=$(cat /tmp/primary_pod.txt)
# create app user authenticated as admin
kubectl -n mongodb exec $POD -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin-user:admin123password@localhost:27017/admin" --eval '
db.getSiblingDB("appdb").createUser({
  user: "app-user",
  pwd: "app123password",
  roles: [ { role: "readWrite", db: "appdb" } ]
})' 2>&1
